summary: Downtown arterial with heavy retail and event traffic. Weekday peaks 7-9 AM and 4-7 PM; Saturday midday spikes near festivals. Level 4-5 common during incidents.
mitigation_notes: Coordinate with transit detours; prioritize signal retiming on cross streets; push alternate routes via app when level >= 4.

summary: Merge-heavy segment with limited acceleration lanes. Chronic backups when upstream incidents occur; weather amplifies stop-and-go.
mitigation_notes: Pre-position towing; variable message signs 5 miles upstream; consider shoulder use policy only under police direction.

summary: Pedestrian volume and curbside pickup create friction; congestion often localized rather than corridor-wide.
mitigation_notes: Expand loading zones off-peak; enforce curb management; short green extensions for pedestrian phases only outside peaks.

summary: Single bridge approach with no parallel crossing within 2 miles. Any stall or crash propagates quickly.
mitigation_notes: Rapid incident detection; partner with marine traffic when drawbridge cycles add delay; communicate expected clearance times.

summary: Generally free-flow except during major flight banks and holidays. Construction windows can temporarily raise levels.
mitigation_notes: Schedule lane closures overnight; sync with airport ground ops for surge notifications.

summary: Truck queuing at security checks backs onto public road mid-morning. Not captured by typical commute models.
mitigation_notes: Stagger gate appointments; holding pens inside the park; public message when queue exceeds 10 minutes.

summary: Class change bells and game days produce sharp 15-minute spikes; bike lanes reduce effective width.
mitigation_notes: Temporary officers on game days; delay non-urgent road work; micro-transit loops to reduce curb demand.

summary: Scenic route with seasonal tourism; summer weekends see intermittent slowdowns near parking lots.
mitigation_notes: Event parking shuttles; dynamic parking availability in traveler apps.

summary: Long-haul truck concentration and steep grades; slow trucks in right lane create passing churn and shockwaves.
mitigation_notes: Climbing lane enforcement; weigh station coordination; forecast-based speed advisories for trucks.

summary: Intermodal hub: buses, rideshare, and taxis compete for curb space; transfers spike congestion in a 2-block radius.
mitigation_notes: Geofenced pickup zones; time-limited standing zones with camera enforcement; integrate rail delay feeds into street timing.
